ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "directed_by" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre(s) of the movie */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type(s) of the movie */,
  "initial_release_date" TEXT /* Initial release date of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's trailer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie in different regions */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_directed_by FOREIGN KEY ("directed_by") REFERENCES directors ("director_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the director */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (administrator, moderator, or regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the movie to their watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Initial release date of the movie

URL of the director's profile picture
Role of the user (administrator, moderator, or regular user)
ID of the movie being reviewed
ID of the user who wrote the review
